content: Uranus has 27 known moons. The five largest are Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. The other smaller moons include Caliban, Sycorax, Portia, Cressida, Desdemona, Juliet, Puck, Portia, and others.
raw_content: Uranus has 27 known moons. The five largest are Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. The other smaller moons include Caliban, Sycorax, Portia, Cressida, Desdemona, Juliet, Puck, Portia, and others.
